class.name: GeneratorGridShape3D
class.brief_description: A query generator that generates a horizontal grid around each [QueryContext3D].
class.description: A query generator that generates a horizontal grid around each [QueryContext3D].

members.member: Reference [QueryContext3D], where a grid will generate on each of these positions.
The half the size of the grid, similar to radius.
Offset the position of the [QueryItem3D] vertically by this amount after projecting it. Useful to avoid accidental collisions when doing visibility tests.
Height where the raycast search will end.
Height where the raycast search will start.
The space between each point in the grid.
Use a [Shape3D] instead of a raycast.
If [code]true[/code], casts ray onto the ground to position the [QueryItem3D]s.
